title: Miconia paleaciramis
taxonomy: Miconia paleaciramis is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. This family is a group of plants commonly known as the melastome family or the memecylids. Miconia paleaciramis is classified as a member of the genus Miconia, which is a large and diverse group of plants. The classification of Miconia paleaciramis is further supported by its placement in the tribe Miconieae, within the family Melastomataceae. These classifications indicate that Miconia paleaciramis shares characteristics with other members of the Melastomataceae family.
